title: cyclosorus immersus
intro: Cyclosorus immersus, also known as the creeping maiden fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Cyclosorus immersus can be prepared in different forms, including tea, infusion, and tincture, which are often used to treat various ailments.
